# Peroot - Hebrew AI Prompt Engineering Tool (Full Documentation)

> Peroot is an AI-powered prompt generator built specifically for Hebrew. It transforms raw ideas into structured, professional-grade prompts optimized for ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek, and other LLMs. It also generates platform-specific prompts for image and video generation tools. This is the comprehensive documentation for AI models and developers.

## Key URLs
- [Homepage](https://www.peroot.space/): Main app - prompt enhancement tool
- [Pricing](https://www.peroot.space/pricing): Free, Guest, and Pro plan details
- [Blog](https://www.peroot.space/blog): Guides and tutorials on prompt engineering
- [Examples](https://www.peroot.space/examples): Sample prompts and use cases
- [Prompt Writing Guide](https://www.peroot.space/guide): Professional Hebrew prompt engineering guide
- [Prompt Library Index](https://www.peroot.space/prompts): Browse 480+ prompts by category
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.peroot.space/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](https://www.peroot.space/terms)
- [Contact](https://www.peroot.space/contact)
- [Summary LLM Documentation](https://www.peroot.space/llms.txt)

---

## 5 Capability Modes (Detailed)

### 1. Standard Text Mode
Generates structured prompts for conversational LLMs. The output follows the "Great Prompt" format which includes: context setting, clear goal definition, constraints and boundaries, output format specification, and tone guidance. Optimized for ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek, and other text-based models.

### 2. Deep Research Mode
Creates comprehensive research-oriented prompts with multi-source methodology. Designed for users who need thorough analysis, literature reviews, market research, or academic exploration. Includes instructions for source validation, cross-referencing, and structured findings presentation.

### 3. Image Generation Mode
Produces platform-specific visual prompts tailored to the syntax, parameters, and strengths of each image generation platform. Outputs include aspect ratios, style parameters, negative prompts, and platform-native formatting. After generation, users receive direct links to open their prompt in the target platform.

### 4. Video Generation Mode
Creates video-specific prompts optimized for each video generation platform's capabilities. Includes motion descriptions, camera movements, scene transitions, duration, and style guidance specific to each platform's feature set.

### 5. Agent Builder Mode
Generates system prompts and configuration for autonomous AI agents. Includes role definition, behavioral constraints, tool-use instructions, fallback handling, and conversation flow design. Useful for building chatbots, customer service agents, and automated workflows.

---

## Supported Image Generation Platforms

| Platform | Specialty |
|----------|-----------|
| **Midjourney** | Artistic, stylized imagery with strong aesthetic control. Supports aspect ratios, style parameters (--s), chaos (--c), and version selection. |
| **DALL-E 3** | Integrated with ChatGPT. Strong at text rendering in images, photorealistic scenes, and following complex instructions. |
| **Flux** | Open-source, fast inference. Good balance of quality and speed. Supports various model sizes for different use cases. |
| **Stable Diffusion** | Highly customizable with LoRA support, ControlNet, and extensive community models. Best for technical users who want fine-grained control. |
| **Google Imagen** | Google's image generation model. Strong photorealism and text understanding. Available through Google Cloud and Gemini. |
| **Gemini Image** | Integrated within Google's Gemini ecosystem. Multimodal understanding allows image generation informed by conversational context. |

## Supported Video Generation Platforms

| Platform | Specialty |
|----------|-----------|
| **Runway Gen-4** | Industry-leading video generation with precise motion control, camera movements, and multi-clip workflows. Supports image-to-video and text-to-video. |
| **Kling 2.0** | Excels at realistic human motion and complex scenes. Supports long-form generation up to 2 minutes. Strong at maintaining temporal consistency. |
| **Sora** | OpenAI's video model. Strong at understanding physics, complex scenes, and generating cinematic sequences with natural motion. |
| **Google Veo 3** | Google's video generation model. High-fidelity output with strong understanding of real-world physics and cinematography. |
| **Higgsfield** | Specializes in personalized video generation. Strong at character consistency and social media-optimized short-form content. |
| **Minimax Hailuo** | Fast generation with good quality-to-speed ratio. Supports various styles from realistic to animated. Strong community adoption. |

---

## Prompt Scoring System

### Text Prompt Scoring (9 Dimensions)
Each text prompt is evaluated on a 1-10 scale across:
1. **Clarity** - How clear and unambiguous the prompt is
2. **Specificity** - Level of detail and precision
3. **Context** - Background information provided
4. **Goal Definition** - How well the desired outcome is defined
5. **Constraints** - Boundaries and limitations specified
6. **Format** - Output structure and formatting guidance
7. **Tone** - Communication style and register
8. **Examples** - Use of examples to guide output
9. **Completeness** - Overall prompt coverage

### Visual Prompt Scoring (8 Dimensions)
Image and video prompts are scored on:
1. **Subject Description** - Main subject clarity
2. **Style/Aesthetic** - Visual style specification
3. **Composition** - Framing and layout guidance
4. **Lighting** - Light conditions and mood
5. **Color Palette** - Color guidance and harmony
6. **Technical Parameters** - Platform-specific settings
7. **Mood/Atmosphere** - Emotional tone of the visual
8. **Detail Level** - Granularity of the description

---

## 29 Supported Categories

1. Marketing (שיווק) - Digital marketing, campaigns, branding
2. Sales (מכירות) - Sales processes, proposals, negotiations
3. Customer Support (תמיכה) - Customer service, problem solving
4. Product (מוצר) - Product management, feature planning, UX
5. Operations (תפעול) - Process optimization, project management
6. HR (משאבי אנוש) - Recruitment, training, organizational culture
7. Development (פיתוח) - Code writing, debugging, architecture, DevOps
8. Education (חינוך) - Teaching, students, exams, curricula
9. Legal (משפטי) - Contracts, legal advice, regulation
10. Creative (קריאייטיב) - Creative writing, stories, poetry, scripts
11. Social Media (סושיאל) - Posts, stories, reels, viral content
12. SEO (קידום אתרים) - Organic promotion, keywords, SEO content
13. Finance (פיננסים) - Financial analysis, budgets, investments
14. Healthcare (בריאות) - Health, medicine, healthy lifestyle
15. E-commerce (אי-קומרס) - Online stores, product descriptions
16. Real Estate (נדל"ן) - Property sales, apartment marketing
17. Strategy (אסטרטגיה) - Strategic planning, market analysis
18. Design (עיצוב) - Graphic design, UI/UX, visual branding
19. Data (דאטה) - Data analysis, SQL, visualization, BI
20. Automation (אוטומציה) - Process automation, scripts, integrations
21. Community (קהילה) - Community management, events, engagement
22. Nonprofit (מלכ"ר) - Fundraising, social marketing, third sector
23. Images (תמונות) - Image generation prompts for Midjourney, DALL-E, etc.
24. General (כללי) - General-purpose everyday prompts
25. Cooking (בישול) - Recipes, meal planning, culinary tips
26. Travel (טיולים) - Trip planning, routes, travel experiences
27. Sports & Fitness (ספורט וכושר) - Training programs, nutrition
28. Personal Development (פיתוח אישי) - Motivation, productivity, growth
29. Greetings (ברכות) - Holiday greetings, birthdays, weddings
30. Music (מוזיקה) - Song creation, lyrics, and melodies

---

## Technical Architecture

- **Frontend**: Next.js 15 (App Router) + React 19 + TypeScript
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS with custom design system
- **Backend**: Next.js API Routes + Supabase (PostgreSQL + Auth + Edge Functions)
- **Hosting**: Vercel (with ISR and Edge Runtime)
- **AI Engines**: OpenAI GPT-4o, Anthropic Claude, Google Gemini, DeepSeek, Groq
- **Analytics**: PostHog, Google Analytics, Microsoft Clarity, Vercel Analytics
- **PWA**: Service worker with offline support
- **I18n**: Hebrew (primary) and English, with RTL-native layout

---

## API Access for Developers

### Endpoint
`POST https://www.peroot.space/api/enhance`

Developers can integrate Peroot's prompt enhancement capabilities into their own tools and workflows via the REST API.

---

## Chrome Extension

- **Version**: v2
- **Capabilities**: Inline prompt enhancement on any webpage, quick access to prompt library, one-click enhancement of selected text
- **Availability**: Chrome Web Store

---

## Referral Program

- Users can refer friends and earn automatic rewards
- Referral tracking is built into the platform
- Both referrer and referred user receive bonus credits

---

## Pricing Comparison

| Feature | Guest | Free | Pro |
|---------|-------|------|-----|
| Daily prompts | 1 | 2 | ~5/day (150/month) |
| Signup required | No | Yes | Yes |
| Public prompt library | Yes | Yes | Yes |
| All AI engines | Limited | Limited | All |
| Iterative refinement | No | No | Yes |
| Personal library | No | No | Yes |
| Chrome extension | No | Yes | Yes |
| Image/Video prompts | Yes | Yes | Yes |
| Agent builder | No | No | Yes |
| Price | Free | Free | NIS 3.99/month |
| Free trial | N/A | N/A | 4 days |
